basic_details.job_title: ICAR NIPB Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: ICAR-National Institute for Plant Biotechnology (NIPB), New Delhi
basic_details.short_information: ICAR-NIPB is recruiting 1 Junior Research Fellow with PG degree and NET qualification. Walk-in Interview is on 20 July 2026.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: Male: 35 years Female: 40 years (as per ICAR guidelines)
qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate degree in Plant Breeding/Genetics/Biotechnology/Bioinformatics/Life Science with NET qualified OR Bachelors’ degree with 4 years + national level exam qualification

salary_details.details: Fixed Monthly Emoluments: Rs. 37,000/- + HRA (for first two years)

selection_process: Selection will be done through Walk-in Interview. Only candidates with essential qualifications will be considered. Final selection is subject to verification of original documents and performance in the interview.
how_to_apply: This is a Walk-in Interview recruitment.
Fill the Application Form strictly in the prescribed format (all fields mandatory).
Send a soft copy of the application form along with all documents in a single PDF to [email protected] mentioning Advertisement No. in the subject.
Bring 2 copies of the filled application form and 2 self-attested photocopies of all documents on the interview date.
Carry all Original Documents for verification.
Report at LBS Building, Pusa Campus, New Delhi – 110012 by 09:30 A.M. on 20.07.2026.
List of Documents to Carry (Original + 2 Self-attested Copies): Application form, CV, all educational certificates, experience certificates, category certificate (if applicable), publications, etc.
important_instructions: The position is purely temporary and contractual. No TA/DA will be provided for attending the interview. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Candidates must be present at least 60 minutes before the interview time. The Institute reserves the right to increase/decrease the number of posts.

content_sections.heading: ICAR-NIPB JRF Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: ICAR-NIPB is recruiting 1 Junior Research Fellow with PG degree and NET qualification. Walk-in Interview is on 20 July 2026.

rows.details: Post Graduate degree in Plant Breeding/Genetics/Biotechnology/Bioinformatics/Life Science with NET qualified OR Bachelors’ degree with 4 years + national level exam qualification
Relevant experience in pathogen handling, plant breeding, field trials, molecular biology, Bioinformatics tools, NGS techniques
Male: 35 years Female: 40 years (as per ICAR guidelines)

content_sections.heading: ICAR-NIPB JRF Recruitment 2026 Emoluments
content_sections.text: Fixed Monthly Emoluments: Rs. 37,000/- + HRA (for first two years)

content_sections.heading: ICAR-NIPB JRF Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be done through Walk-in Interview. Only candidates with essential qualifications will be considered. Final selection is subject to verification of original documents and performance in the interview.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for ICAR-NIPB JRF Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: This is a Walk-in Interview recruitment. Step-by-step Process: List of Documents to Carry (Original + 2 Self-attested Copies): Application form, CV, all educational certificates, experience certificates, category certificate (if applicable), publications, etc.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for ICAR-NIPB JRF Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: The position is purely temporary and contractual. No TA/DA will be provided for attending the interview. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Candidates must be present at least 60 minutes before the interview time. The Institute reserves the right to increase/decrease the number of posts.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in ICAR NIPB JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is 1 (One) vacancy for Junior Research Fellow.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date for ICAR NIPB JRF Walk-in Interview 2026?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 20 July 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for ICAR NIPB JRF position?
faq.answer: Post Graduate degree in Plant Breeding/Genetics/Biotechnology/Life Sciences with NET qualification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for ICAR NIPB JRF 2026?
faq.answer: Male: 35 years, Female: 40 years (as per ICAR guidelines).

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for ICAR NIPB Junior Research Fellow vacancy?
faq.answer: Through Walk-in Interview on 20.07.2026. Advance copy can be sent by email.

faq.question: Q7. Is NET qualification mandatory for ICAR NIPB JRF?
faq.answer: Yes, NET qualification is required along with Post Graduate degree.

faq.question: Q8. What is the project title for this ICAR NIPB JRF position?
faq.answer: Identification and characterization of powdery mildew resistance in Indian mustard.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required for ICAR NIPB JRF Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Original + 2 self-attested copies of all educational certificates, CV, experience letters, etc.

faq.question: Q10. Are there upcoming JRF vacancies at ICAR NIPB?
faq.answer: Candidates should regularly check the ICAR-NIPB website for future project-based JRF and research positions.
